content.introduction: The Federal Reserve's April 28-29, 2026 FOMC meeting concluded with Jerome Powell announcing key decisions. The meeting's official minutes and statement are available on the Federal Reserve's website.

Provided the conflict in the Middle East is short lived, the drag on growth and hit to inflation is likely to be relatively small (see [forecast](https://economics.td.com/us-quarterly-economic-forecast)).
